reviews.review_description: when I try to use an app to play in vr ( by going to the add list and using your FD games) nothing will get added to the list can only watch videos and even then it doesn't work that well. I was hoping that since this was out on Gear VR now it would be great instead of the cardboard box vr..any ideas on what to do so I can use your games ?
The gear vr version doesn't connect. You have to dow it off Google play, but the controller won't work with that.

All the built-in videos I tried were low resolution and horribly blurry.  The environment itself seems fine and Youtube seemed OK. I didn't try Faceache which might be why I missed the "multiplayer" elelment.

Love the 360 and 2d videos with the video quality option but wheres the games section it said in the description? and why is mode not available?  The cinema can use a really nice makeover as well. its just the default red seat youtube cinema i saw in other video apps and some of the seats and doors are outta place or proportion. i do like how you can choose skyboxs though but other than that its not bad.
